<?php declare(strict_types=1); /* * This file is part of PHPUnit. * * (c) Sebastian Bergmann <sebastian@phpunit.de> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace PHPUnit\Framework\MockObject; /** * @no-named-arguments Parameter names are not covered by the backward compatibility promise for PHPUnit * * @internal This trait is not covered by the backward compatibility promise for PHPUnit */ trait DoubledCloneMethod { public function __clone(): void { $this->__phpunit_state = clone $this->__phpunit_state; $this->__phpunit_state()->cloneInvocationHandler(); } abstract public function __phpunit_state(): TestDoubleState; }
